item.name: Striped Ray Conch
item.description: A massive conch shell that, when blown, summons a striped ray to your side.

mount.name: Striped Ray
mount.action: Summon forth your striped ray, a majestic creature native to the Ruby Sea.
mount.description: Raised and trained by the Kojin, this striped ray has the same mellow temperament as its original masters. Its flat body works in like fashion to the aether-imbued wings of an airship, allowing it to catch water- and wind-aspected aether to glide through both sea and sky with ease.
mount.tooltip:
I advise you to
stand back when he
regurgitates everything.
- Zukin
